rows.description: Arrearagia pro Do. Novr. 1023. Brot over
rows.notes: Amounts match between extractors. Description refined based on visual inspection: 'Novr.' (from gpt-5-mini) and '1023' (from gemini-flash) are clear in the image, correcting gpt-5-mini's '1823' misread. 'Brot over' (from gemini-flash) is also clear. Gpt-5-mini's notes correctly highlight faintness, but misread the year.

Amounts match. Description refined by visual check, 'Tenements' (gemini-flash correct spelling) and '--- 1 yr' (gemini-flash correct formatting with dashes) are accurate. The values are clearly readable in the image.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from the Yarnton rectory and tenements.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from the Yarnton rectory and tenements, amounting to £43 10s 0.25d.

rows.notes: Amounts match. Description refined by visual check, '--- Do' is present after 'Clifton Ferry' (gemini-flash correct). The values are clearly readable in the image. Gpt-5-mini's note about the distinct half-penny loop is appreciated.

rows.notes: Amounts match. Description refined by visual check, '--- Do' is present (gemini-flash correct). Pence digit '1' is clear, and there is no fraction. Gpt-5-mini's note about ambiguity on pence digit '1' or '11' is a good example of careful consideration, but visual confirms '1'.

rows.notes: Amounts determined by visual override due to significant disagreement. The pounds value is clearly '1836' (gemini-flash correct, gpt-5-mini had '133'). The shillings is '9' (gemini-flash correct). The pence is '0' (gemini-flash correct), not '9' (gpt-5-mini incorrect). The fraction is '0.5' (both correct). Gpt-5-mini misread several digits in pounds and pence. Gemini-flash was largely accurate here.
